headline: BlackRock (BLK) Stock Fair Value Edges Higher After Q2 Driven Analyst Target Increases
summary: BlackRock sits in the middle of a changing analyst playbook, with fair value estimates edging from US$1,251.69 to US$1,273.69 and many price targets now grouped in a range around US$1,300 to US$1,488. Those higher targets are tied to refreshed models after the Q2 earnings beat, as research desks weigh updated earnings forecasts against how the stock is currently priced. As you read on, you will see how to track this evolving narrative and what to watch as new estimates come through. Analyst...

headline: BlackRock tops $15tn: Where does the world's largest asset manager put it all?
summary: BlackRock has become the first asset manager to oversee more than $15 trillion (€13tn), nearly three times the nominal annual output of Germany, the EU’s largest economy. Here is how the money is spread.View on euronews
